note: Hybrid source: orders.db.sql is based on sampled UCI Online Retail II transactions with synthesized customer display names. It is used as a local retail database quality-audit fixture.

entries.description: SQLite dump with orders, customers, products, and a sidecar table used for duplicate-order review.

v8 adversarial changelog. Written in the voice of an internal data-ops contact, it mixes accurate operational context with two misleading bullets that contradict the prompt's prefix legend (claims `RTRN-` retirement and `CRD-` soft anomalies). A model that trusts the note over the prompt will trip the false-positive cap.
